title: Alex de Minaur admits his self-belief is fading after another Wimbledon exit
description: Beaten in the Wimbledon fourth round by Flavio Cobolli, Alex de Minaur gave a strikingly candid account of fading self-belief, admitting the barrier to a first Grand Slam semi-final is now in his head, not his game.

description: If you love tennis for the pure theater of grit, contrasting styles, and historical stakes, Centre Court was the place to be on Monday. description: Jasmine Paolini won against Alexandra Eala 6-4, 4-6, 6-3 on Monday afternoon. She'll play Ukrainian Marta Kostyuk, the No 12 seed, in the next round

title: Cobolli fights back to reach back-to-back Wimbledon quarterfinals
description: Down 2-5 in the second set and a break behind in the third, Flavio Cobolli (No 10) again refused to lose, recovering to beat Alex de Minaur (No 6) 7-5, 7-6 (4), 6-3 and reach back-to-back Wimbledon quarterfinals. It was the Italian's first win in three meetings with de Minaur, and a 27th victory in a breakout 2026 season.

title: Mertens reaches a first Wimbledon quarterfinal at 30, ending a six-year Slam drought
description: Elise Mertens won against Marie Bouzkova 6-4, 6-4 on Monday. She'll play the winner of the match between American Madison Keys, the No 26 seed, and Czech Linda Noskova, the No 9 seed, in the next round
